hero.title: Zait & Za'atar
hero.subtitle: Where olive oil meets za'atar — a modern Levantine table in the heart of Dubai.

menu.title: Signature Dishes
menu.subtitle: A handpicked selection from our kitchen — rooted in Levantine tradition, plated for Dubai.

about.title: Rooted in the Levant, at home in Dubai
paragraphs: Zait & Za'atar began with a simple table and the scent of wild thyme — recipes carried across generations from the hills of the Levant.
Today, in the heart of Dubai, we plate that heritage with intention: charcoal-fired, olive-oil rich, and unmistakably warm.
about.quote: Every dish begins with two things — good oil, and good company.

gallery.title: A Levantine table, Dubai light
gallery.subtitle: Warm stone, charcoal smoke, and the colours of the souk.

location.title: Find us in Dubai
location.address: City Walk, Al Wasl, Dubai, UAE

footer.tagline: Levantine kitchen in the heart of Dubai.
